scripts.dev:stable:safe: npm run db:health && npm run dev:stable
scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,24678 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listeners) { $listeners.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output 'Stopped listeners on 3000/24678 (if any).'"
scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && npm run dev
scripts.preview:stable: npm run build && BTM_DB_PATH=${BTM_DB_PATH:-$PWD/bowling.db} NODE_ENV=production node dist-server/server.js
